name: snap-research/LoCoMo
capability_target: Long-term conversational memory, temporal/event summaries, personalized QA, and abstention under non-commercial source terms.

input_contract.metadata: license-blocked source card and task taxonomy only
input_contract.query: personalized long-memory QA or abstention question
input_contract.memory_system: VCM and non-VCM baselines under equal context budgets

output_contract.latency: local retrieval and graph traversal cost
output_contract.residuals: temporal miss, stale preference, wrong speaker, or false answer

contamination_policy: LoCoMo public data is not staged under current non-commercial license policy. Private analogues may mirror task categories only.
regression_policy: If private conversation-memory rows are mastered, keep them as regression and leave public LoCoMo queued unless license policy changes.

permission_envelope.tools: local loaders, scorers, and report writers

teacher_role: No teacher solving or public conversation paraphrase generation.
